Hi Damir,

Sorry for the delay in getting back I had some family over from Europe and just got back to work today.

Thanks for getting back to me and great to hear there may be a way to connect Team Global Express into your website platform.

Before you go to the effort of reviewing our pricing,  I wanted to outline that while these rates are rather generic, I can fine tune it for Billy Goat Lawns where you feel we are out with certain lanes.

From what we typically see with growing e-commerce businesses (especially with garden equipment), some of the main pain points are:

• High East Coast freight costs from Perth
• Inconsistent transit times with Aust Post. 7-12 days.
• Damage claims due to handling through multiple depots
• Limited flexibility with parcel vs heavier carton movements
• Platforms not giving competitive national pricing to regional towns etc.

This is where TGE can add value.

We operate both Road Express and IPEC (Priority) networks, meaning you can use:

  *   Road Express for cost-effective standard deliveries

  *   Priority for urgent or higher-service freight where speed matters, I will submit this once you like the below.

For your reference, below are our indicative Road Express rates ex-Perth:

Cube factor is 250, which is helpful for lighter but bulky cartons - something lawn equipment businesses often deal with.

Why a trial makes sense:

• You can compare landed cost vs your current carrier. Aust Post from feedback they have one rate when submitting their Proposal and its a lot of adhoc costs when factoring regional and tail gates and other factors we are far more consistent from Customer feedback.
• You gain access to a national multi-modal network under one provider. Air - Road - Rail and Couriers all on offer.
• We can support future growth if volumes increase or scale down if you are in cost saving mode.
• Yo willl have a dedicated contact (myself) and a Dedicated Account manager for day to day for escalations and support.

Even if the integration takes a bit of effort, having a competitive secondary carrier gives you leverage and supply chain resilience, especially when volumes grow.

If you would like, I am happy to run some comparison on a few recent consignments so you can see costs vs actuals and transit times.

Kind regards


RJ Albuquerque

We will need assistance from you to get the required details to make it happen.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef

Moving to L3:

**Case:** Feasibility check for integrating Team Global Express (TGE) with PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App.

**Details:**
We have received a request to evaluate the possibility of integrating **Team Global Express (TGE)** into our PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App.

The TGE team have provided the below information:

- They have provided the Integration Document (attached) that contain all the specifications required to commence integration development with TGE.
- The specifications can also be downloaded via Customer Onboarding Specifications.
Please note that this document follows the TGE API Messaging standards and all the relevant Specifications for each element are embedded within this document.
- We need to register at the two links below a valid MyTeamGE account so that they can create unique login credentials for us via the below links.
- Once we have registered the same username in both environments below, we have to inform TGE team so they can commence API credentials access.
  - UAT: https://ps.myteamge.com
  - PRD: https://www.myteamge.com

- If we are integrating the Manifest API to request Shipment ID and SSCC Ranges, we need to complete the Online form For Ranges/SSCC.
- They have also mentioned that prior to commencing with TGE via Shipment create into a Live environment, approval is required via a team member from the TGE integration team.
- We can also bring across our own SSCC range if we inform them of the Company prefix and the extension digit.


Note: Please do not attempt to post the sample files within the document without modifying the data to match our carrier specific details such as Account Numbers.

**TGE Contact Details:**
Name: George Giaras
Email ID: george.giaras@teamglobalexp.com

Name: RJ Albuquerque
Email ID: raj.albuquerque@teamglobalexp.com

They are also open to schedule a technical call if required.

**Store Details:**
App: MCSL
Store URL: billy-goat-lawn-care.myshopify.com
Account ID: 88ba9b98-7b50-43bf-b842-aae9bb4f4bf4
Carriers: Aramex MyFastway and Australia Post
Label Count: 912 in April 2026 and 1590 in March 2026.
Active from 26.12.2023 and selected $49 Premium Plan
